trigger_observable_action.utterance_summary: Maer displays a clipped routing chain and asks for a category that lets rescue touch the artifact without erasing the sound it made.
observable_cues: vendor handoffs visible enough to pressure Veyr

participant_appraisals.private_interpretation: Veyr interprets Maer's masked hashes as deliberate pressure rather than proof: enough path to threaten the vendor surface, not enough to force a clean custody admission. He suspects Maer wants a rescue aperture more than a courtroom victory, but he treats that as a working read, not a fact. The phrasing keeps the chain infrastructural and the artifact unresolved while giving Maer a narrow way to move before the window dies.
participant_appraisals.attributed_motive: Maer may want a rescue aperture more than a courtroom victory, but Veyr treats that as a working read, not fact.
participant_appraisals.misread_risk: Medium. Veyr may overread moral pressure as a direct attempt to turn his vendor chain into testimony.

state_deltas.rationale: He keeps source-chain custody collapsed while offering only handling language.
He sets terms around record language and category use.
Maer has enough routing chain to threaten the vendor surface.
The risk of one wrong noun pushes Veyr deeper into defensive product language.

relationship_deltas.rationale: Maer asked for handling rather than demanding a confession.
Maer can apparently use a narrow procedural opening.
The masked hashes prove Maer can pressure the vendor surface.
Veyr still expects Maer to use language as legal leverage.

next_action_constraints: Veyr has offered only handling language, not provenance.
Veyr will close the file if personhood or ancestry terms enter the formal request.

trigger_observable_action.utterance_summary: Then stop asking for ancestry. Ask for handling. The category is derivative routing residue with active distress-correlated service behavior. It stays nonperson, nonorigin, noncustodial. It permits isolation, ledger-backed repair-bay contact, and preservation of the packet sound as diagnostic evidence. If you put a moral noun in the request, I close the file and you can spend the heat window teaching a tribunal how language becomes a corpse with paperwork.
observable_cues: Veyr does not touch Maer's clipped chain. He angles the conference glass away from the room recorder, opens a tribunal-safe diagnostic template on the side display, and leaves the source-chain field collapsed. One finger rests on the record-status control without pressing it.

participant_appraisals.private_interpretation: Veyr is still hiding the source chain, but the offered category may be enough to move rescue contact before the heat window closes.
participant_appraisals.attributed_motive: Veyr is protecting the vendor chain while conceding the minimum useful path.
participant_appraisals.misread_risk: Medium. Maer may mistake the useful category for moral cooperation, or reject it because the source chain remains hidden.

state_deltas.rationale: He now has to carry the category back into tribunal and sanctuary constraints.
Veyr helped only by preserving the chain that may have caused the harm.

relationship_deltas.rationale: Veyr created a usable path instead of total refusal.
The category is precise enough to be operational.
The response is obstructive but not useless.
Veyr did not bury the rescue aperture entirely.

next_action_constraints: Maer can take the handling category back to Sella and the tribunal.
Maer must avoid formal personhood or ancestry language if he wants Veyr to keep the file open.

If you put a moral noun in the request, I close the file and you can spend the heat window teaching a tribunal how language becomes a corpse with paperwork.
observable_cues: Veyr does not touch Maer's clipped chain. He angles the conference glass away from the room recorder, opens a tribunal-safe diagnostic template on the side display, and leaves the source-chain field collapsed. One finger rests on the record-status control without pressing it.

accepted_world_state_candidates: Veyr has offered a tribunal-safe handling category: derivative routing residue with active distress-correlated service behavior.
The category permits isolation, ledger-backed repair-bay contact, and preservation of packet sound as diagnostic evidence.
Source-chain custody remains withheld and artifact personhood remains unresolved.
manual_review_notes: The responder output was accepted without prose repair.
The category is accepted as scene-local procedural state, not as truth about the artifact.
Both Maer and Veyr receive state, relationship, memory, and event updates.
The research trace is runner-captured at the coordinator retrieval layer; the responder had no repo access.
deferred_mutations: No personhood claim is proven or disproven.
No Cognitum provenance confession is canonized.
No automatic appraiser or mutator is trained yet.
